label: expansion-sprint
topWin: Expansion protocol worked as designed — human-blocked primary queue triggered compound refinement that shipped 6 items with 57 net-new tests, growing test count from 191 to 248.
topGap: Pickup weight table is not normalized (sums ~1.07); time_dilation pickup remains unreachable by Math.random(). Preserved for behavioral parity — needs a design decision.
ignisNote: Session demonstrated the expansion protocol adds real value when the primary queue is human-blocked — compound refinement produced a full sprint of work from what would otherwise have been a stall.
